title: Fire-Rain 3
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fire-Rain 3''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] bio-agent. It developed under the supervison of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Sartar]] at [[supply depot I-389]], located on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Moff Sartar planned to test Fire-Rain 3 on the populations of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] and [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], but was foiled when a team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agents managed to destroy all samples of the deadly bio-agent, along with Sartar's laboratory.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-09-XX -->''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]''
